About Us

Ahmedabad's Most Trusted
Property Consultancy

Founded on integrity. Built on relationships. Driven by results.

🏛
Our Story

Started With a Promise — Delivered With Passion

Satyam Property Consultancy was born from a simple belief: every buyer and seller deserves complete transparency, honest guidance, and a partner who puts their interest first — not commissions.

Headquartered at Centrum Heights, Nava Vadaj, Ahmedabad, we serve clients across all major micro-markets — from Bopal and Prahlad Nagar to Chandkheda and SG Highway — with the same commitment to excellence.

Our unique subscription-based model eliminates hidden brokerage. You pay a fixed fee — and we work entirely for you.

500+
Properties Transacted
15+
Years in Business
300+
Happy Families
50+
Builder Tie-Ups
Why Choose Us

What Makes Satyam Different

🚫

Zero Brokerage Model

We charge a transparent subscription fee — no percentage-based brokerage, no hidden charges at the time of deal.

🤝

Dedicated Relationship Manager

Every client gets a personal Relationship Manager and Property Consultant — your own team, not a random agent.

📋

End-to-End Support

From property shortlisting to home loan assistance, Agreement to Sale, and Sale Deed — we are with you at every step.

🏦

Home Loan Assistance

We coordinate with leading banks — SBI, HDFC, ICICI, Axis and more — to help you get the best loan at the best rate.

📍

Deep Local Expertise

6+ years in Ahmedabad's real estate market means we know every locality, every builder, and every price trend better than anyone.

Our Process

How We Work — Step by Step

1

Register

Pay subscription. Get dedicated RM assigned within 24 hrs.

2

Shortlist

RM shares curated options matching your budget and needs.

3

Site Visits

PC arranges and accompanies you for property visits.

4

Negotiate

We negotiate price and terms on your behalf for the best deal.

5

Loan & Docs

Closing Manager handles loan, ATS, documentation with you.

🔑

Possession

Sale deed registered. Keys handed over. Home sweet home!

Our Values

What We Stand For

🎯

Integrity First

No hidden costs, no inflated prices, no misleading information — ever.

📊

Market Expertise

Deep knowledge of Ahmedabad's micro-markets for precise advice.

🤝

Client First

Your goals drive our work. We recommend only what truly fits your needs.

🌱

Long-term Bonds

Our clients become our advocates. We are always here beyond the transaction.

💡

Innovation

Digital tools, virtual tours, real-time tracking — modern real estate the right way.

Plans, Pricing & EMI

Transparent Pricing.
Complete Support.

Choose the right plan for your property journey and calculate your loan instantly.

Subscription Plans

Choose Your Role

Step 1 · Registration

Buyer Registration

₹ 5,000 + GST
✓ Valid for 60 Days
  • Relationship Manager who arranges property visits as per your schedule
  • Property Consultant who guides you during every property visit
  • Dedicated point of contact throughout your search period
Step 2 · On Successful Deal

Buyer Deal Closure

₹ 21,000 + GST
📅 At time of Agreement to Sale
  • Closing Manager who negotiates price and terms on your behalf
  • Manages all documentation and loan processing end-to-end
  • Connects you with a qualified Advocate for legal advice and title verification
Step 1 · Registration

Seller Registration

₹ 5,000 + GST
✓ Valid for 90 Days
  • Relationship Manager who manages and coordinates all buyer visits
  • You are notified before every buyer visit — full control over your schedule
  • After every visit, connect with RM for visit review and buyer feedback
Step 2 · On Successful Deal

Seller Deal Closure

₹ 21,000 + GST
📅 At time of Agreement to Sale
  • Closing Manager who negotiates price and terms on your behalf
  • Full guidance and support throughout the entire process
  • Complete documentation support and compliance paperwork

All prices exclusive of GST (18%). Terms apply.

Terms & Conditions

Last Updated: January 2025 · Satyam Property Consultancy®

1. About Us

Satyam Property Consultancy® operates from 505 & 506 Centrum Heights, Opp. Trisha Hospital, Near Akhbarnagar Circle, Nava Vadaj, Ahmedabad – 380013, Gujarat, India.

2. Buyer Subscription Plans

2.1 Buyer Registration – ₹5,000 + GST | Valid 60 Days

  • Dedicated Relationship Manager who arranges property visits
  • Property Consultant who guides you during every visit

2.2 Buyer Deal Closure – ₹21,000 + GST | At Agreement to Sale

  • Closing Manager negotiates on your behalf
  • Manages all documentation and loan processing
  • Connects with Advocate for legal advice (advocate fees separate)

3. Seller Subscription Plans

3.1 Seller Registration – ₹5,000 + GST | Valid 90 Days

  • Relationship Manager manages and coordinates buyer visits
  • Seller notified before every buyer visit
  • Post-visit review available via Relationship Manager

3.2 Seller Deal Closure – ₹21,000 + GST | At Agreement to Sale

  • Closing Manager negotiates on your behalf
  • Full guidance throughout the entire process

4. Payment & Refund Policy

  • Subscription fees are payable in advance and non-refundable once services commence
  • Deal Closure fees charged only on successful deal execution
  • GST at 18% applicable on all fees

5. Limitation of Liability

We are not liable for title defects, loan approval failure, registration delays or market fluctuations after purchase.

6. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by Indian law. Disputes are subject to exclusive jurisdiction of courts in Ahmedabad, Gujarat.

Ahmedabad's trusted real estate partner since 2020.

Legal

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: January 2025 · Satyam Property Consultancy®

1. Information We Collect

  • Full name, PAN, Aadhaar, date of birth
  • Mobile, email, residential address
  • Budget range, bank details (for transactions only)
  • Property preferences and visit history

2. How We Use Your Information

  • To assign Relationship Managers, Consultants, Closing Managers
  • To match Buyers with properties and Sellers with Buyers
  • To process payments and maintain financial records
  • To comply with legal and regulatory requirements

3. Data Sharing

We do not sell your data. We may share with builders (with your consent), banks (for loans at your request), advocates (for legal advisory), and government authorities as required by law.

4. Data Retention

Minimum 7 years as required under Indian financial and real estate regulations.

5. Your Rights

  • Right to access your information
  • Right to correct inaccurate data
  • Right to withdraw consent (may affect service delivery)

Contact: info@satyampropertyconsultancy.com

Ahmedabad's trusted real estate partner.

Disclaimer

Last Updated: January 2025 · Satyam Property Consultancy®

1. Property Information

  • Prices are indicative and subject to change without notice
  • Areas, configurations and specifications are indicative only
  • Availability is subject to prior sale or rental

2. No Legal or Financial Advice

Nothing on this website constitutes legal, financial or investment advice. We strongly recommend engaging a qualified property lawyer and CA before any transaction.

3. Subscription Disclaimer

  • Plans provide facilitation services and do not guarantee a successful transaction
  • Deal Closure assistance is a support service — final decisions rest with Buyer and Seller
  • Advocate referrals are a courtesy; advocate fees are separate

4. RERA Compliance

Buyers should independently verify RERA registration on the Gujarat RERA portal (gujrera.gujarat.gov.in) before booking.

5. Market Information

Market trends and price insights are based on current observations and are not guaranteed projections.
